title: Creating a Email Nurture campaign/integration
excerpt: I am looking to create email journeys for prospects on a Monday board that I can turn on and off based on a Status. What is the best System to use for this, the Gmail integration, MailChimp or some other integration?

posts.author: jonathansv (Jonathan McGowan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to create email journeys for prospects on a Monday board that I can turn on and off based on a Status. What is the best System to use for this, the Gmail integration, MailChimp or some other integration?
